# Python dependencies for the RC room-temperature forecasting pipeline.
#
# Versions are intentionally unpinned: the project's virtual environment was
# not available when this file was generated. After installing, you can pin
# exact versions with:  pip install -r requirements.txt && pip freeze > requirements.txt

# --- Core data + modeling ---
numpy
pandas
matplotlib
scikit-learn        # sklearn.metrics in scripts/error_table.py

# --- File I/O engines used by the loaders (imported indirectly via pandas) ---
pyarrow             # pandas.read_parquet / to_parquet (loaders/load_vav_unit_c.py, load_building.py)
openpyxl            # pandas.read_excel / to_excel (.xlsx inputs and previews)

# --- Only needed by scripts/smap_example_query.py (optional sMAP/Brick example) ---
# The sMAP client itself is a local checkout added via SMAP_PYTHON_DIR, not a PyPI package.
bokeh
brickschema
